scope_note: QA Witt Tower Orbit Weekly Direction Certificate [458]. Tests whether QA orbit class (S/Sat/C on mod-27 weekly return rank bins) predicts NEXT-WEEK PRICE DIRECTION on 5 US equity indices (^GSPC, ^IXIC, ^RUT, ^DJI, QQQ). Primary source: Fama EF (1970) Efficient capital markets doi:10.2307/2325486 (random-walk baseline). MAPPING: weekly log-return → rank in N-return window → bin=floor(rank*27/N) ∈ Z/27Z; consecutive pairs (b=bins[t-1], e=bins[t]) → orbit_class(b,e). PRIMARY RESULT: Pooled S-orbit → next-week POSITIVE direction (n_S=92, mean=+1.17%, C_mean=+0.20%, pos_rate=60.9%, perm_p=0.0008 two-tail). PER-INDEX: IXIC(perm_p=0.015), DJI(perm_p=0.002), QQQ(perm_p=0.022) significant; GSPC marginal (0.138); RUT null (0.606, small-cap exception). NON-EXTREME PAIRS: 13/27 GSPC S-orbit weeks are (b!=0,e!=0) — QA divisibility captures structure beyond extreme-crash filter. TIMESCALE CONTRAST: weekly S_mean>0 (bounce) vs monthly S_mean<0 from cert [457] (continuation). CERTIFIED: (C1) pooled n_S=92>=80, perm_p=0.0008<0.01 PASS. (C2) S-C diff=+0.0097>=0.005 PASS. (C3) pos_rate=60.9%>55% PASS. (C4) 3 of 5 individually significant PASS. (C5) weekly S_mean>0 PASS. (C6) non-extreme GSPC pairs=13>=10 PASS. Structural parents: cert [110] (Witt Tower), cert [457] (monthly volatility+direction). Validated 2026-06-18.
